description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a combination of white and dark surfaces, with wood accents and large glass windows that provide ample natural light. A prominent porch area with a railing wraps around one side, offering outdoor seating and gathering space. The front facade includes a main entrance, a large display window, and a signpost set in a landscaped patch. The rear and side elevations are more enclosed, with fewer windows and a focus on privacy. The overall structure sits on a broad, rectangular plot with a paved area extending from the entrance.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with wood accents, large windows, and a wraparound porch on a rectangular plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large display window, porch area, and a signpost in landscaped greenery.
description_view_1: Side view with minimal windows, highlighting the solid white wall and the depth of the structure.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring the porch with seating, wood accents, and a more private, enclosed facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the porch, main entrance, and the signpost, with a clear view of the roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
